reviews.comment:
Sigue fallando la atención en horas picos con mucha gente. Hay dos empleados para cobrar y servir. A veces hay 3, a veces. Los empleados bien y hacen lo que pueden. Falta personal de atención al público. Es una pena, que un lindo parador suceda esto.

(Translated by Google)
The service continues to be lacking during peak hours when it's crowded. There are only two employees to handle payments and serve customers. Sometimes there are three, sometimes there aren't. The employees are fine and do what they can. There's a shortage of customer service staff. It's a shame that such a nice inn is experiencing this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtZ3ZHekZnEAE

reviews.comment:
